% Synthetic stub .tex for smoke test scenario rollback_60.
% Mirrors prop texts in rollback_60.jsonl so iso check passes,
% allowing R4 PATTERN-A mechanical contradiction to fire on PRE-fix state.

% L1 — Iverson boundary axiom
A sensitivity family $\{\xi_s\}_{s \in S}$ satisfies \emph{Iverson's law of similarity} if there exist continuous functions $\gamma\colon J \times S \to \R \setminus \{0\}$ and $\eta\colon J \times S \to S$ with the boundary conditions $\gamma(1, s) = 1$ and $\eta(1, s) = s$.

% L2 — Theorem 1 hypothesis
Suppose $\xi$ satisfies Iverson's law of similarity with $\eta(\lambda, s) = f(s)$ for a continuous function $f\colon S \to S$.

% L3 — Case B with f-extension
Case (B) Logarithmic: $\gamma(\lambda, s) = \lambda^b\, e^{c(s - f(s))/a}$ (reduces to $\lambda^b$ at $f = \mathrm{id}$; $f$ may be any continuous map here).

% L4 — Case C with f-extension
Case (C) Power: $\gamma(\lambda, s) = \lambda^b\, \sqrt[a]{(s + c_2/c)/(f(s) + c_2/c)}$ (reduces to $\lambda^b$ at $f = \mathrm{id}$; $f$ may be any continuous map here).
